subcodes.first_line: O people of Baha! Jinab-i-Za'ir has appeared in the gathering of exiles and lifted up his voice in your remembrance, requesting that this be written [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل بها جناب زائر در مجمع آوارگان حاضر و بذکر شما ناطق گشت خواهش تحریر این
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
